channel.title: [Blog Post] SEO for Headless WordPress Themes
channel.description:
If you want to build a headless WordPress theme, there are some SEO challenges that you need to consider:
1️⃣ JavaScript & Server Side Rendering 2️⃣ Search Engine Requirements 3️⃣ Performance Metrics
In this post, we explain you how to deal with them to keep your SEO up: https://frontity.org/blog/seo-for-headless-wordpress-themes/
Hope it helps!

item.title: [Blog Post] SEO for Headless WordPress Themes
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
If you want to build a headless WordPress theme, there are some SEO challenges that you need to consider:

JavaScript & Server Side Rendering
Search Engine Requirements
Performance Metrics

In this post, we explain you how to deal with them to keep your SEO up:

Frontity – 9 Sep 19

SEO for Headless WordPress Themes

A practical guide on SEO for Headless WordPress Themes: what challenges you need to consider and how to solve them to keep your SEO up.

Hope it helps!

Read full topic
item.source: [Blog Post] SEO for Headless WordPress Themes
